name: web
description: apps/web — the GAMOPLS TeamCore fleet manager dashboard (MAP/CHAT/BOARD/HUB UI). Next.js App Router. Route handlers under app/api/* are the ONLY path this app uses to reach services/map|chat|board|hub — they validate the session JWT and inject org_id/fleet_id before forwarding, per CLAUDE.md's API-gateway rule. React components never fetch a backend service directly.
